message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Usuario" as U
boundary "boundary" as B
control "control" as C
collections "Equipos" as EQ
participant ":Equipo" as E

U -> B : expelTeam(data)
activate B
B -> C
activate C
C -> EQ : expelTeam(data)
activate EQ
EQ -> E
activate E
deactivate E
deactivate EQ
deactivate C
deactivate B
@enduml
